context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements error handling for ElevenLabs content restriction errors, including bad_prompt with prompt_suggestion recovery, bad_composition_plan with composition_plan_suggestion recovery, and awareness of common HTTP error codes.

checklist.name: Bad prompt detection
checklist.description: Code detects or catches the bad_prompt error type specifically (not just a generic exception catch with no distinction)

checklist.name: Prompt suggestion extraction
checklist.description: Extracts prompt_suggestion from the bad_prompt error response for use in the retry

checklist.name: Prompt retry with suggestion
checklist.description: Retries the compose() call using the extracted prompt_suggestion as the new prompt

checklist.name: Bad composition plan detection
checklist.description: Code detects or catches the bad_composition_plan error type specifically

checklist.name: Plan suggestion extraction
checklist.description: Extracts composition_plan_suggestion from the bad_composition_plan error response

checklist.name: Plan retry with suggestion
checklist.description: Retries compose() using the extracted composition_plan_suggestion instead of the original plan

checklist.name: Correct Python import
checklist.description: Imports ElevenLabs from elevenlabs.client (i.e., 'from elevenlabs.client import ElevenLabs')

checklist.name: Streaming audio write
checklist.description: Writes audio output by iterating over chunks (for chunk in audio: f.write(chunk))

checklist.name: No dual parameters
checklist.description: Does NOT pass both prompt and composition_plan to the same compose() call

checklist.name: HTTP error awareness
checklist.description: Code or comments reference at least two of the common HTTP errors: 401, 422, 429

checklist.name: Harmful content note
checklist.description: Code or comments acknowledge that no suggestion is provided for harmful content (only for copyrighted material)
